hero.subtitle: Swiss Executive Chef & Culinary Consultant
hero.tagline1: Four decades of experience. Three continents. One passion:
hero.tagline2: Artisan cuisine from fresh, natural ingredients — from scratch.

about.title: About Me
about.subtitle: Chef by passion, entrepreneur by conviction
about.p1: I am a classically trained Swiss chef — apprenticed at the Hotel de la Paix in Lausanne, shaped by the large-scale kitchens of the Anaheim Hilton in California, and honed over 20 years as an entrepreneur in Colombia.
about.p2: In Cartagena I founded Restaurante Casa Suiza — Swiss fusion cuisine with daily fresh bread, Basler Läckerli with coffee, and Spätzle as the bestseller. Later I built a complete food manufacturing operation: cheese, yogurt, charcuterie, baked goods — all artisanal and from scratch.
about.p3: When the milk quality wasn't good enough, I bought my own Jersey cows — for higher protein and fat content. I roasted coffee over charcoal in the Sierra Nevada, smoked meats with avocado wood, and aged blue cheese in the Andes. Now I'm bringing this experience back to Switzerland.

highlights.camper: Own camper van — flexible across Switzerland

usp.label: Your Advantage
usp.text: No accommodation needed. I bring my own camper van and am flexibly deployable across all of Switzerland — for seasonal or temporary engagements, with zero logistics on your end.

services.title: My Services
services.subtitle: Consultant, concept developer, and executive chef in one.

items.title: Menu Development & Consulting
items.description: Seasonal menu concepts developed from scratch. Local, fresh, sustainable — from Alpine wild herbs to classic Swiss dishes.

items.title: Food Cost Optimization
items.description: With an MBA and 30 years of entrepreneurial experience, I analyze purchasing, portioning, and workflows — for maximum profitability without compromising quality.

items.title: Staff Training & Kitchen Organization
items.description: Establish efficient workflows, train kitchen staff, and eliminate stress situations through smart menu design — not manage them.

items.title: Pop-up Events & Catering
items.description: From Swiss Night events to Alpine pop-up dinners. Experience with large-scale events, corporate catering, and exclusive private dining.

items.title: Artisanal Product Development
items.description: Cheese, charcuterie, baked goods, yogurt, jams, sauces — all artisanal and from scratch. Product development to market readiness.

items.title: Relief Chef & Replacement
items.description: Available at short notice as an experienced executive chef for emergencies, seasonal reinforcement, or holiday cover. Rapid onboarding guaranteed.

approach.title: My Approach
approach.firstWeekText: I get my hands dirty — from the chef's office to the dishwashing station. I observe production and operational processes, analyze workflows, and learn the organization from the ground up.
approach.stressText: When stress situations occur excessively, workflows need to be optimized — not the staff. Often, smart menu adjustments are enough to sustainably reduce kitchen pressure while ensuring quality and consistency.
approach.profitNichesText: that others overlook: On a rainy day in the Alps with no guests, I produce granola energy bars for hikers or kombucha as a refreshment — additional revenue from existing resources.
approach.menuDevText: Local first, fresh first, seasonal first, quality first. I hike through forests and Alpine meadows, gathering wild berries and mountain thyme for my kitchen.

experience.title: My Career
experience.subtitle: From Lausanne's hotel kitchens via California and Colombia — back to Switzerland.

gallery.title: My Creations
gallery.subtitle: From artisan cheese to Black Forest cake to tricolor Spätzle — everything from scratch.

credentials.title: Qualifications & References
credentials.subtitle: Swiss federal qualifications, international diplomas, and top-tier references.
